page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at a base frequency of 2.55 GHz. The x86_64 architecture operates with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating systems and data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Given the high density of dedicated physical cores relative to memory, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. It is designed for high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and compute-heavy web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. Powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz, it provides 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance features 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading overhead. It is suited for high-performance computing, batch processing, and intensive compute tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores, 256 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight AMD EPYC cores and a high-speed thirty-two gigabit network interface.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 physical cores with no hyperthreading
256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
Zero local storage and no integrated GPU accelerators
Suited for compute-intensive workloads, batch processing, and scientific modeling
